---
title: "cjk_check.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/debug/cjk_check.py"
loc: 38
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.23
style_score: 3.85
intel_score: 5.61
overall_score: 5.30
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating CJKDiagnostic, execute.

## Interaction Protocol
Import CJKDiagnostic and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [os](file://os)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `CJKDiagnostic`
- `execute`
- `_search_and_print`
